Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Jun-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Fredrik Emilson for plaintiff and moving party Pacific Bell Directory
Stephen V. Wickersham for defendant and opposing party All My Sons Moving & Storage, Inc.

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff Pacific Bell Directory's application for right to attach order and for issuance of writ.
Granted as to defendant All My Sons Moving & Storage, Inc, and AMS Moving & Storage, Inc. only; Right to Attach Order and Order For Issuance of Writ of Attachment shall issue to secure plaintiff's claim in the amount of $439,416.52.
MODIFICATION: Bond shall be $20,000.
ORDER SIGNED. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
